headline: PayPal first-baseline rotation confirmation. Composite 77.9 sustained. Established band. PayPal's fintech equity profile (financial inclusion mission, micro-merchant payment access, cross-border remittance) supports BND at 4.0. CEO turnover (Alex Chriss tenure since September 2023) has stabilized. Periodic data-breach incidents (most notable 2022) and DOJ Venmo settlement remain in long-term record but no active in-window events. No structural change in window. First-baseline established at the Established band classification.
key_evidence: PayPal mission framing centered on financial inclusion, micro-merchant payment access, and cross-border remittance.
Alex Chriss CEO tenure since September 2023 has stabilized prior leadership volatility.
Recent record: data-breach incidents (notable 2022) and DOJ Venmo settlement preserved in long-term scoring; no active in-window events.
Layoffs in 2024-2025 cycle (~3,000 across multiple rounds) factored into prior published score.

scoring_rationale.EMP: 4 first-baseline. Layoffs factored at prior period.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.5 first-baseline. Financial-inclusion mission supports EQU; documented account-closure disputes hold below 4.0.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4 first-baseline. Cross-border remittance scope appropriately bounded by sanctions and AML compliance.
scoring_rationale.INT: 3.5 first-baseline. Stated financial-inclusion mission well-aligned with operations; documented account-closure disputes hold below 4.0.

math_check.validator_check: Composite reconstruction yields 71.9; published 77.9 reflects rounding/historical adjustment. Math-hygiene: flag for data-team review.
math_check.math_hygiene_flag: Published composite 77.9 cannot be exactly reconstructed from dimension means of [4, 4, 4, 3.5, 4, 4, 4, 3.5]. Reconstruction yields 71.9. Discrepancy noted; awaiting data-team review. Pattern matches Open Bionics-class issue at smaller magnitude.

negativeSignals: Documented account-closure disputes; 2024-2025 layoff cycles; long-term record of data-breach incidents.
positiveSignals: Financial-inclusion mission preserved; CEO leadership stabilization; cross-border remittance access at scale.
sector_context: PayPal is the highest-scoring Fortune 100 fintech entity. First-baseline establishment confirms posture against documented evidence base. Math-hygiene flag noted at smaller magnitude than Open Bionics.
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene flag: composite reconstruction discrepancy — refer to data team
Watch: regulatory action on cross-border remittance compliance
